turns.user_message: I tried to be positive today, but it didn't really work. I still feel like I'm not good enough.
I keep trying to cheer myself up, but it feels pointless. I'm convinced there's something fundamentally wrong with me.
I've given up on trying to feel better because I don't deserve it. I'm just a burden that everyone has to put up with.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
